text: Look, the August mechanical for 'Low Ceiling' is STILL not here. It was due 2025-09-30 for $145.00 and I'm tired of chasing this. Don't tell me it's "processing".

Hey, minor news: Streaming trickle again - like $129.60 for 'Bass Walk' on 2025-09-15. Not exciting. The PRO thing might be $198.00 end of month (2025-09-30). Anyway, if you want to jam, cool; if not, all good.

Marcos, the 'Garden Rooms' performance royalties were $210.00 on 2025-07-31. Credits looked off on the compilation. If that's your side, can we fix the liner notes? I'm not looking for drama, just accuracy.
